summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 5 token Value vectors drawn as 4-cell columns of GREEN/RED-colored Squares with fill_opacity = |v_i|. Top row shows attention weights (YELLOW if >0.3, else GREY_A) for a query, dominant on 'sat' (0.6). TransformFromCopy scales each column by its weight into PURPLE weighted columns below; then + signs and = signs build the weighted sum column on the right in YELLOW with SurroundingRectangle. Bottom MathTex: z = Σ softmax(QK^T)_i · V_i.
